reasoning: With only 38 days left until the resolution date (end of 2025), Ali Khamenei remains the official Supreme Leader of Iran, despite persistent reporting throughout 2025 that he is increasingly 'unreachable' and 'sidelined' due to failing physical and mental health. While the risk of an 86-year-old in poor health passing away within a 5-week window is elevated, the base rate remains low (approx 3-5%). The market estimate from November 13, 2025, sat at 0.94, strongly signaling that bettors do not anticipate an imminent, formal succession or death before year's end. Furthermore, while the primary resolution source (the CIA World Factbook) is reportedly sunsetting around early 2026, its historical and alternate 'credible reporting' criteria will apply, and credible reporting uniformly recognizes Khamenei as currently retaining his title. I align my estimate closely with the recent 94% market forecast.
